message:
test(runtime): migrate benchmarks and tests to table abstraction API

Update all test and benchmark files to use the new TaskTable/RegionTable/
ObligationTable APIs. This completes the API migration across the entire
codebase.

Changes by category:

Benchmarks (benches/):
- cancel_drain_bench.rs: use table accessors
- scheduler_benchmark.rs: use table accessors

Conformance tests (conformance/):
- negative.rs: update to use table methods, add error case coverage

Integration tests (tests/):
- allocation_audit.rs, cache_aware_queues.rs: use table accessors
- cancel_lane_fairness_bounds.rs: use table methods
- contention_e2e.rs: update lock assertions for new API
- e2e_geodesic_normalization.rs: use table accessors
- golden_outputs.rs: use table iterators
- io_cancellation.rs: use table methods
- lab_determinism.rs: use table accessors
- otel_metrics.rs: use table methods
- phase0_verification.rs: update to table API
- property_region_ops.rs: use table methods
- repro_spawn_hang.rs: use table accessors
- scheduler_backoff.rs: use table methods
- scheduler_lane_fairness.rs: use table accessors
- scheduler_stress_fairness_e2e.rs: use table methods
- sync_conformance.rs: update for new API
- sync_e2e.rs: major expansion with new contention scenarios (+207 lines)

The sync_e2e.rs expansion adds comprehensive contention testing including
multi-lock acquisition patterns, deadlock detection, and fairness validation
under high contention.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
